description: Composition Green kurta made of 100% cotton, has round neck with slit, embellishments around neckline, three quarter length sleeves with embellished cuffs and long vents at sides with embellishment Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron The neckline, cuffs and vents on this kurta from biba are decorated with beautiful patterns with silver thread detail which subtly shines out against the green piping. Wear this over leggings or over trousers depending on the occasion. Smart enough to wear to the office or to a formal party, dress this kurta up by wearing bold earrings and bangles. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
